content.problemStatement:
Consider a grid with HHH rows (numbered 111 through HHH) and WWW columns (numbered 111 through WWW). Let's denote the value in a cell in row iii and column jjj by hi,jh_{i,j}hi,j‚Äč. NNN particles (numbered 111 through NNN) are distributed in the cells in such a way that there is at most one particle in each cell. For each valid iii, the iii-th particle has a value pip_ipi‚Äč and it is placed in the cell in row yiy_iyi‚Äč and column xix_ixi‚Äč.

Let's denote the set of all particles by PPP and the set of all unordered pairs of particles that are located in side-adjacent cells by EEE. We define the value of the grid as
V=‚ąĎi‚ąąPpi‚čÖhyi,xi+‚ąĎ(i,j)‚ąąEpi‚čÖpj‚ÄČ.V = \sum_{i \in P} p_i \cdot h_{y_i,x_i} + \sum_{(i,j) \in E} p_i \cdot p_j \,.V=‚ąĎi‚ąąP‚Äčpi‚Äč‚čÖhyi‚Äč,xi‚Äč‚Äč+‚ąĎ(i,j)‚ąąE‚Äčpi‚Äč‚čÖpj‚Äč.

You are given the grid and the locations of all particles, but not their exact values ‚Äē only ‚ą£p1‚ą£,‚ą£p2‚ą£,‚Ä¶,‚ą£pN‚ą£\lvert p_1 \rvert, \lvert p_2 \rvert, \ldots, \lvert p_N \rvert‚ą£p1‚Äč‚ą£,‚ą£p2‚Äč‚ą£,‚Ä¶,‚ą£pN‚Äč‚ą£. Your task is to choose the sign of each value pip_ipi‚Äč in such a way that the value VVV is maximum possible. Each sign may be chosen independently from all other signs.
constraints: ‚ą£hi,j‚ą£‚Č§1,000\lvert h_{i,j} \rvert \le 1,000‚ą£hi,j‚Äč‚ą£‚Č§1,000 for each valid i,ji, ji,j
1‚Č§yi‚Č§H1 \le y_i \le H1‚Č§yi‚Äč‚Č§H for each valid iii
1‚Č§xi‚Č§W1 \le x_i \le W1‚Č§xi‚Äč‚Č§W for each valid iii
no two particles are located in the same cell
the sum of H‚čÖWH \cdot WH‚čÖW over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers HHH, WWW and NNN.
HHH lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains WWW space-separated integers hi,1,hi,2,‚Ä¶,hi,Wh_{i,1}, h_{i,2}, \ldots, h_{i,W}hi,1‚Äč,hi,2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,hi,W‚Äč.
NNN more lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains three space-separated integers yiy_iyi‚Äč, xix_ixi‚Äč and ‚ą£pi‚ą£\lvert p_i \rvert‚ą£pi‚Äč‚ą£.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case, print two lines.


The first of these lines should contain a single integer ‚Äē the maximum value of VVV.
The second line should contain NNN space-separated integers. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these integers should be 111 if you choose a positive sign for the value of the iii-th particle (i.e. its value should be ‚ą£pi‚ą£\lvert p_i \rvert‚ą£pi‚Äč‚ą£) or ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 if you choose a negative sign (i.e. its value should be ‚ąí‚ą£pi‚ą£-\lvert p_i \rvert‚ąí‚ą£pi‚Äč‚ą£).
If there are multiple solutions, you may find any one.
